pageContext.name: Kairi
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Square Enix are proud to present the Kairi Action Figure!  Kairi, the Keyblade wielder and childhood friend of Sora and Riku from the Kingdom Hearts series, makes her appearance in the Play Arts Kai line based on her design from Kingdom Hearts III!  With a distinctive hair texture and gentle yet vivacious expression, this figure depicts Kairi after her growth Keyblade wielder training. You can see the beautiful attention to detail even in the vivid pink coloring of her pink top and skirt.  This figure comes with two face options, including a smiling face and a battle face, additional hand parts, and Kairi's highly decorative Keyblade 'Destiny's Embrace' to reenact various scenes from the story.
